name: HWM_TM_REP_RECORD_ATRBS_V
query: SELECT FUNC.ATTRIBUTE_ID, FUNC.ATTRIBUTE_NAME, FUNC.ATTRIBUTE_TYPE, FUNC.ATTRIBUTE_VALUE, TR.TM_REC_ID TM_REC_ID, TR.TM_REC_VERSION TM_REC_VERSION FROM HWM_TM_REC TR, TABLE (HWM_TIME_REPOS_REST.GET_TM_ATRB_VALS(TR.TM_REC_ID , TR.TM_REC_VERSION)) FUNC WHERE TR.LATEST_VERSION = 'Y' AND NVL(TR.DELETE_FLAG, 'N') = 'N'
